summary: P0.2 TODAY Watchlist Integration - Fixed critical bug where empty apiUrl prevented watchlist fetch. Backend fully working, frontend now displays watchlist in TodayPanel correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Empty apiUrl ('') was treated as falsy, preventing watchlist fetch
bugs_fixed.root_cause: API_URL in utils/api.js is intentionally empty string for relative paths, but TodayPanel used `if (!isOpen || !apiUrl)` which returns true for empty string
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed condition to `if (!isOpen)` only - apiUrl can be empty string for relative paths

critical_code_review_comments: Backend watchlist API is well designed with correct enrichment and stale flag logic
TodayPanel component structure is clean with good data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - TodayPanel displays watchlist correctly after fix

seed_data_creation: Test tickets created: SVC-20260214-FA020F (training, in_progress) for Lola
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0.2 Watchlist integration is complete. TodayPanel shows: 1) IN PROGRESS section with watchlist tickets that are not awaiting user action, 2) AWAITING YOU section (if any) with one-tap quick actions, 3) Stale indicator when data is >5 min old, 4) DOCUMENTS section from pet data. All backend APIs under /api/os/services/ are working. The fix was in TodayPanel.jsx - changed empty apiUrl check to allow relative paths.

frontend_today_panel.notes: Shows IN PROGRESS section with watchlist items after bug fix

frontend_awaiting_you.notes: Section appears when tickets have awaiting_user=true

frontend_stale_indicator.notes: Orange icon appears when stale=true from API
